3 bedroom semi-detached house for sale

Harrogate Road, Stockport, Greater Manchester, SK5
Featured
Chain-free
Semi-detached house
3 beds
2 baths
EPC rating: D
Added > 14 days

Key information

Tenure: Leasehold | 950 yrs left
Council tax: Band A
Broadband: Ultra-fast 2000Mbps *
Mobile signal: 
EEO2ThreeVodafone

Features and description

  • No Onward Chain
  • Off Street Parking
  • Enclosed Garden
  • Two Bathrooms
  • Ground rent: £15
This three-bedroom semi-detached home is offered with no onward chain and is perfect for families, first-time buyers, or investors alike. Ideally situated close to major transport links, reputable schools, and a variety of local amenities, the property offers both convenience and comfort.

Upon entering through the porch, the ground floor comprises of a spacious lounge, a separate fitted kitchen, and a family bathroom. To the rear, a generously sized conservatory provides additional living space and opens onto an enclosed rear garden.

Upstairs, the property boasts three well-proportioned bedrooms, including a master bedroom with an en-suite shower room. Additional benefits include off-street parking, ensuring convenience for homeowners and visitors alike.

This home is not to be missed – contact us today to arrange a viewing!

Visit agent website

Full profileProperty listings
Since 1833, Bridgfords has been serving communities across the North of England with comprehensive sales and lettings services, combining heritage service with local expertise. Each of our branches is located to maximise exposure for your property, with a dedicated team delivering a personalised service for every search.  If you're looking for help with your property needs, contact us today.
